message:
fix: remove JSONL fallback in detectBeadsPrefixFromConfig and fix tmux tests

- Remove leftover JSONL fallback in detectBeadsPrefixFromConfig that was
  missed during the Dolt-only refactor (b4d14145). The function now returns
  empty when config.yaml has no prefix, as intended.

- Fix respawn hook tests to use NewTmuxWithSocket(socket) instead of
  NewTmux(), which was targeting the default socket instead of the test
  socket where sessions were created.

- Fix TestNewSessionWithCommand_Success: the echo command exited instantly
  before CapturePane could read output. Use sh -c with sleep to keep the
  pane alive during capture.

Closes: gt-nxws, gt-r10q

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
